overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through the Del Perro Pier amusement area at sunset, transitioning through an open parking lot, descending wooden stairs, and continuing onto the sandy beach with the Los Santos skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement pier with carnival rides and food stalls

agents.ego_description: running through the amusement pier, weaving between pedestrians and stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in striped shirt walking alongside the path

entered.detail: purple wooden building with neon pink signage and cloud decoration
orange steel roller coaster structure with support beams
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
colorful carnival food stands with red and yellow awnings
small brown wooden kiosks with glass windows
large blue and white painted structural columns
distant downtown skyscrapers visible through the pier structures

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the wooden planks of an amusement pier, passing colorful food stalls and ticket booths. Roller coaster tracks loom overhead while pedestrians stroll through the carnival atmosphere. The warm golden hour light bathes the purple arcade building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier parking lot with city skyline view

events.description: exits covered amusement area into open pier parking lot with visible city skyline
yellow sports car drives past on the right side of the pier

agents.ego_description: running across the open parking area of the pier, heading toward the beach access

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving slowly across the pier parking lot

entered.detail: white painted lines designating parking spaces on the wooden deck
blue sedan and other vehicles parked on the pier
tall palm trees lining the edge of the pier

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide parking area on the pier with the Los Santos skyline prominently visible in the background. The character runs past parked cars and palm trees while a yellow sports car drives by. The wooden deck continues with painted parking lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairs descending from pier to beach

events.description: character begins descending wooden stairs from pier level down to beach

agents.ego_description: running down the wooden stairs from the pier toward the sand

entered.detail: weathered wooden steps leading down from the pier
blue painted metal railings along the stair sides
gray concrete structural walls supporting the pier above

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open pier into a narrow stairwell descending to beach level. Blue metal handrails line the wooden steps as concrete walls enclose the passage. The lighting becomes more diffused under the pier structure.

events.description: steps off wooden stairs onto sand beach, ground surface changes from wood to sand

agents.ego_description: running across the sandy beach toward the water, with the city skyline visible to the left

entered.detail: tan sandy beach surface with footprints and tire tracks
calm ocean water along the shoreline
elevated lifeguard station on the beach
tall white banner flags marking the beach area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the open sandy beach with the ocean visible to the right and the Los Santos skyline to the left. White beach flags line the shore near beached boats. The ground is soft sand with visible tire tracks, and a lifeguard tower stands in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the vibrant, crowded atmosphere of an amusement pier down to the open expanse of a sandy beach at sunset. It begins with the character running along wooden planks past colorful food stalls and ticket booths under looming roller coaster tracks, with warm golden light illuminating a purple arcade building. As the path opens into a wide parking area, the camera captures parked cars and palm trees against the backdrop of the distant Los Santos skyline. The scene then shifts as the character descends a narrow stairwell with blue metal handrails, moving from the bright pier into the diffused light of a concrete passage. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairs onto the soft sand of the beach, passing white flags and beached boats with the ocean to the right and a lifeguard tower in the distance.
